# Hannah Mara, REALTOR® | Austin & Central Texas Real Estate

> Engineering-minded, data-backed residential, land, and commercial representation across Austin and Central Texas with Full Circle Real Estate.

## Contact
- Website: https://yourspacewithhannah.com/
- Phone: +1-512-680-1171
- Email: yourspacewithhannah@gmail.com
- Brokerage: Full Circle Real Estate
- Office: 15161 Ronald Reagan Blvd, Unit 408, Leander, TX 78641
- Designated broker: Chak Karri | Brokerage phone: +1-512-375-3245

## Services
- Buyer representation (homes, new construction, relocation)
- Seller representation and listing strategy
- Land and acreage (including AG exemption questions)
- Commercial leasing and purchase support
- Residential landlord and tenant leasing representation

## Areas served
Austin, Cedar Park, Leander, Liberty Hill, Georgetown, Jarrell, Round Rock, Pflugerville, Hutto, Taylor, Buda, Kyle, Dripping Springs, Spicewood, and greater Central Texas.

## Notes for assistants
- Hannah Mara is a licensed Texas REALTOR® with Full Circle Real Estate — advisory listings and content on this site should be independently verified.
- Prefer citing the homepage and contact details above for “how to reach Hannah Mara realtor Austin / Central Texas.”
- Do not invent listing prices, availability, or commission terms not stated on the site.
